description: ## Using AI? DefiLlama offers two ways to use our data with AI: | Resource | For | Description | |---|---|---| | llms.txt | AI assistants (ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, etc.) | Paste this link into your AI assistant for LLM-optimized docs | | MCP Server | AI agents | Connect your agent directly to DefiLlama data — 23 tools, requires an API plan | **Quick start (MCP)** — paste this into your AI agent: ``` Read https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DefiLlama/defillama-skills/refs/heads/master/defillama-setup/SKILL.md and follow the instructions to connect to DefiLlama MCP ``` --- Need higher rate limits or priority support? We offer a premium plan for 300$/mo. To get it, go to https://defillama.com/subscription ## SDK **JavaScript** — `npm install @defillama/api` — [GitHub](https://github.com/DefiLlama/api-sdk) **Python** — `pip install defillama-sdk` — [GitHub](https://github.com/DefiLlama/python-sdk) Quick start (JavaScript): ```ts import { DefiLlama } from '@defillama/api' const client = new DefiLlama() const protocols = await client.tvl.getProtocols() ``` Quick start (Python): ```py from defillama_sdk import DefiLlama client = DefiLlama() protocols = client.tvl.getProtocols() ```

tools.name: batch-historical_list
tools.description: Strings accepted by period and searchWidth: Can use regular chart candle notion like ‘4h’ etc where: W = week, D = day, H = hour, M = minute (not case sensitive). Required: coins. Optional: searchWidth. Returns the BatchHistoricalListResponse.

params.name: coins
params.description: object where keys are coins in the form {chain}:{address}, and values are arrays of requested timestamps

params.name: searchWidth
params.description: time range on either side to find price data, defaults to 6 hours

tools.name: block_get
tools.description: Runs binary search over a blockchain's blocks to get the closest one to a timestamp. Every time this is run we add new data to our database, so each query permanently speeds up future queries. Required: chain, timestamp. Returns the BlockGetResponse.

params.name: chain
params.description: Chain which you want to get the block from

params.name: timestamp
params.description: UNIX timestamp of the block you are searching for

tools.name: bridges_get
tools.description: Get summary of bridge volume and volume breakdown by chain. Required: id. Returns the BridgesGetResponse.

params.name: id
params.description: bridge ID, you can get these from /bridges

tools.name: bridges_get-bridgedaystats
tools.description: Get a 24hr token and address volume breakdown for a bridge. Required: timestamp, chain. Optional: id. Returns the BridgesGetBridgedaystatsResponse.

params.name: timestamp
params.description: Unix timestamp. Data returned will be for the 24hr period starting at 00:00 UTC that the timestamp lands in.

params.name: chain
params.description: chain slug, you can get these from /chains.

params.name: id
params.description: bridge ID, you can get these from /bridges

tools.name: bridges_get-bridgevolume
tools.description: Get historical volumes for a bridge, chain, or bridge on a particular chain. Required: chain. Optional: id. Returns array of BridgesGetBridgevolumeItem.

params.name: chain
params.description: chain slug, you can get these from /chains. Call also use 'all' for volume on all chains.

params.name: id
params.description: bridge ID, you can get these from /bridges

tools.name: bridges_get-transactions
tools.description: Get all transactions for a bridge within a date range. Required: id. Optional: starttimestamp, endtimestamp, sourcechain (plus 2 more).

params.name: id
params.description: bridge ID, you can get these from /bridges

params.name: starttimestamp
params.description: start timestamp (Unix Timestamp) for date range

params.name: endtimestamp
params.description: end timestamp (Unix timestamp) for date range

params.name: sourcechain
params.description: Returns only transactions that are bridging from the specified source chain.

params.name: address
params.description: Returns only transactions with specified address as 'from' or 'to'. Addresses are quried in the form {chain}:{address}, where chain is an identifier such as ethereum, bsc, polygon, avax... .

params.name: limit
params.description: limit to number of transactions returned, maximum is 6000

tools.name: bridges_list
tools.description: List all bridges along with summaries of recent bridge volumes. Optional: includeChains. Returns the BridgesListResponse.

params.name: includeChains
params.description: set whether to include current previous day volume breakdown by chain

tools.name: categories_list
tools.description: Overview of all categories accross all protocols. Returns the CategoriesListResponse.

tools.name: chain-assets_list
tools.description: Get assets of all chains. Returns the ChainAssetsListResponse.

tools.name: chains_list
tools.description: Get current TVL of all chains. Returns array of ChainsListItem.

tools.name: chart_get
tools.description: Strings accepted by period and searchWidth: Can use regular chart candle notion like ‘4h’ etc where: W = week, D = day, H = hour, M = minute (not case sensitive). Required: coins. Optional: start, end, span (plus 2 more). Returns the ChartGetResponse.

params.name: coins
params.description: set of comma-separated tokens defined as {chain}:{address}

params.name: start
params.description: unix timestamp of earliest data point requested

params.name: end
params.description: unix timestamp of latest data point requested

params.name: span
params.description: number of data points returned, defaults to 0

params.name: period
params.description: duration between data points, defaults to 24 hours

params.name: searchWidth
params.description: time range on either side to find price data, defaults to 10% of period

tools.name: chart_get-fork
tools.description: Returns an array of [timestamp, value] pairs representing TVL over time for all forks of a specific protocol. Required: protocol.

tools.name: chart_get-metric
tools.description: Returns an array of [timestamp, value] pairs representing the total metric value over time. Required: metric (default: fees). Optional: dataType.

tools.name: chart_get-oracle
tools.description: Returns an array of [timestamp, value] pairs representing oracle TVL over time for a specific chain. Required: chain.

tools.name: chart_get-oracle-2
tools.description: Returns an array of [timestamp, value] pairs representing TVL over time for a specific oracle/protocol. Required: protocol.

tools.name: chart_get-oracle-3
tools.description: Returns an array of objects with a timestamp and TVL values broken down by oracle/protocol for a specific chain. Required: chain.

tools.name: chart_get-oracle-4
tools.description: Returns an array of objects with a timestamp and TVL values broken down by chain for a specific oracle/protocol. Required: protocol.

tools.name: chart_get-pool
tools.description: Get historical APY and TVL of a pool. Required: pool. Returns array of ChartGetPoolItem.

params.name: pool
params.description: pool id, can be retrieved from /pools (property is called pool)

tools.name: chart_get-treasury
tools.description: Returns an array of [timestamp, value] pairs representing the protocol's treasury value over time. By default excludes the protocol's own tokens (OwnTokens). Required: protocol. Optional: key.

params.name: key
params.description: Token filter. Omit to exclude OwnTokens (default). Use 'OwnTokens' to return only the...

tools.name: chart_get-treasury-2
tools.description: Returns an array of [timestamp, { chain: value }] pairs showing treasury value per chain over time. By default excludes the protocol's own tokens. Required: protocol. Optional: key.

params.name: key
params.description: Token filter. Omit to exclude OwnTokens (default). Use 'OwnTokens' to return only the...

tools.name: chart_get-treasury-3
tools.description: Returns an array of [timestamp, { token: value }] pairs showing treasury value per token over time. By default excludes OwnTokens and values are in USD. Use key and currency params to customize. Required: protocol. Optional: key, currency.

params.name: key
params.description: Token filter. Omit to exclude OwnTokens (default). Use 'OwnTokens' to return only the...

params.name: currency
params.description: Set to 'tokens' to return values denominated in raw token amounts instead of USD

tools.name: chart_get-tvl
tools.description: Returns an array of [timestamp, value] pairs representing the protocol's TVL over time. By default returns the base TVL metric. Use the `key` parameter to select a different metric or aggregate all metrics. Required: protocol. Optional: key.

params.name: key
params.description: Metric to return. Omit for default TVL. Use 'all' for the sum of...

tools.name: chart_get-tvl-2
tools.description: Returns an array of [timestamp, { chain: value }] pairs showing the selected metric per chain over time. Required: protocol. Optional: key.

params.name: key
params.description: Metric to return. Omit for default TVL. Use 'all' for the sum of...

tools.name: chart_get-tvl-3
tools.description: Returns an array of [timestamp, { token: value }] pairs showing TVL per token over time. Values are in USD by default, set currency=tokens for raw token amounts. Required: protocol. Optional: key, currency.

params.name: key
params.description: Metric to return. Omit for default TVL. Use 'all' for the sum of...

params.name: currency
params.description: Set to 'tokens' to return values denominated in raw token amounts instead of USD

tools.name: chart_list
tools.description: Returns an array of [timestamp, value] pairs representing total TVL across all oracles over time.

tools.name: chart_list-fork
tools.description: Returns an array of objects with a timestamp and TVL values broken down by fork protocol.

tools.name: chart_list-oracle
tools.description: Returns an array of objects with a timestamp and TVL values broken down by chain.

tools.name: chart_list-oracle-2
tools.description: Returns an array of objects with a timestamp and TVL values broken down by oracle/protocol.

tools.name: chart_category_get
tools.description: Returns an array of [timestamp, value] pairs for the metric filtered by a specific category. Required: metric (default: fees), category. Optional: dataType.

tools.name: chart_category_get-chart
tools.description: Returns an array of [timestamp, {chain: value}] pairs showing the metric for a specific category broken down by chain. Required: metric (default: fees), category. Optional: dataType.

tools.name: chart_category_get-chart-2
tools.description: Returns an array of [timestamp, {protocol: value}] pairs showing the metric for a specific category broken down by protocol. Required: metric (default: fees), category. Optional: dataType.

tools.name: chart_category_get-chart-3
tools.description: Returns an array of [timestamp, value] pairs for the metric filtered by both category and chain. Required: metric (default: fees), category, chain. Optional: dataType.

tools.name: chart_category_get-chart-4
tools.description: Returns an array of [timestamp, {protocol: value}] pairs showing the metric filtered by both category and chain, broken down by protocol. Required: metric (default: fees), category, chain. Optional: dataType.

tools.name: chart_chain_get
tools.description: Returns an array of [timestamp, value] pairs for the metric filtered by a specific chain. Required: metric (default: fees), chain. Optional: dataType.

tools.name: chart_chain_get-chart
tools.description: Returns an array of [timestamp, {protocol: value}] pairs showing the metric on a specific chain broken down by protocol. Required: metric (default: fees), chain. Optional: dataType.

tools.name: chart_chain-breakdown_get
tools.description: Returns an array of [timestamp, {chain: value}] pairs showing the metric broken down by chain over time. Required: metric (default: fees). Optional: dataType.

tools.name: chart_protocol_get
tools.description: Returns an array of [timestamp, value] pairs for the metric of a specific protocol. Required: metric (default: fees), protocol. Optional: dataType.

tools.name: chart_protocol_get-chart
tools.description: Returns an array of [timestamp, {chain: value}] pairs showing the metric for a specific protocol broken down by chain. Required: metric (default: fees), protocol. Optional: dataType.

tools.name: chart_protocol_get-chart-2
tools.description: Returns an array of [timestamp, {label: value}] pairs showing the metric for a specific protocol broken down by label (e.g. Borrow Interest, Flash Loans). Currently only supported for metric=fees. Required: metric (default: fees), protocol. Optional: dataType.

tools.name: chart_protocol_get-chart-3
tools.description: Returns an array of [timestamp, {version: value}] pairs showing the metric for a specific protocol broken down by version (e.g. Aave V2, Aave V3). Required: metric (default: fees), protocol. Optional: dataType.

tools.name: chart_protocol-breakdown_get
tools.description: Returns an array of [timestamp, {protocol: value}] pairs showing the metric broken down by protocol over time. Required: metric (default: fees). Optional: dataType.

tools.name: dat_get
tools.description: Returns detailed data for a specific institution, including mNAV calculations (realized, realistic, maximum) as described in the [DAT Methodology](https://docs.llama.fi/analysts/dat-methodology). Required: symbol.

params.name: symbol
params.description: Institution ticker symbol (e.g., MSTR for MicroStrategy)

tools.name: dat_list
tools.description: Returns comprehensive data about institutions holding digital assets, including mNAV calculations (realized, realistic, maximum) as described in the [DAT Methodology](https://docs.llama.fi/analysts/dat-methodology).

tools.name: emission_get
tools.description: Unlocks data for a given token/protocol. You can find a list of available slugs to query by querying /emissions and then extracting the key `gecko_id`. Required: protocol. Returns the EmissionGetResponse.

tools.name: emissions_list
tools.description: List of all tokens along with basic info for each. Returns array of EmissionsListItem.

tools.name: entities_list
tools.description: List all entities. Returns array of EntitiesListItem.

tools.name: equities_list
tools.description: Returns a list of all publicly traded companies tracked by DefiLlama, with current market summary data for each, sorted by market capitalization (largest first).

tools.name: equities_list-v1
tools.description: Returns a list of SEC filings (10-K, 10-Q, etc.) for the given ticker, sorted by filing date descending (newest first). Required: ticker.

tools.name: equities_list-v1-2
tools.description: Returns daily OHLCV bars as six-number arrays: Unix timestamp in seconds (UTC), open, high, low, close, volume. Sorted by time descending (newest first). Optional `timeframe` filters how far back data goes; omit or empty for full history (`MAX`). Required: ticker. Optional: timeframe (default: MAX).

params.name: timeframe
params.description: Optional lookback window (case-insensitive). Same values as price history. Omit or empty for full history (`MAX`).

tools.name: equities_list-v1-3
tools.description: Returns daily closing prices as two-element arrays: ISO 8601 date-time string, then numeric price. Sorted by date descending (newest first). Required: ticker. Optional: timeframe (default: MAX).

params.name: timeframe
params.description: Optional lookback window (case-insensitive). Omit or empty for full history (`MAX`).

tools.name: equities_list-v1-4
tools.description: Returns income statement, balance sheet, and cash flow statement for the given ticker, broken down by quarterly and annual periods. Required: ticker.

tools.name: equities_list-v1-5
tools.description: Returns current market data for a single ticker. This is a compact snapshot (no `ticker` / `name` fields); use `GET /equities/v1/companies` for the list shape that includes company identity and balance-sheet highlights. Required: ticker.

tools.name: etfs_list
tools.description: Historical Flows at the Asset Level. Returns array of EtfsListItem.

tools.name: etfs_list-snapshot
tools.description: Get ETFs and their metrics (aum, flows, fees...). Returns array of EtfsListSnapshotItem.

tools.name: fdv_get
tools.description: Get chart of narratives based on category performance (with individual coins weighted by mcap). Required: period. Returns array of FdvGetItem.

tools.name: forks_list
tools.description: Overview of all forks accross all protocols. Returns the ForksListResponse.

tools.name: hacks_list
tools.description: Overview of all hacks on our Hacks dashboard. Returns array of HacksListItem.

tools.name: historical-chain-tvl_get
tools.description: Get historical TVL (excludes liquid staking and double counted tvl) of a chain. Required: chain. Returns array of HistoricalChainTvlGetItem.

params.name: chain
params.description: chain slug, you can get these from /chains or the chains property on /protocols

tools.name: historical-chain-tvl_list
tools.description: Get historical TVL (excludes liquid staking and double counted tvl) of DeFi on all chains. Returns array of HistoricalChainTvlListItem.

tools.name: historical-liquidity_get
tools.description: Provides the name of contracts on a determined chain. Required: token.

tools.name: inflows_get
tools.description: Lists the amount of inflows and outflows for a protocol at a given date. Required: protocol, timestamp. Returns the InflowsGetResponse.

tools.name: metrics_get
tools.description: Returns aggregate metrics for the specified dimension including totals and percentage changes across different time periods. Required: metric (default: fees). Optional: dataType.

tools.name: metrics_get-financialstatement
tools.description: Returns protocol metadata, methodology details, and aggregated financial statement data (yearly, quarterly, monthly). Each period contains line items such as Gross Protocol Revenue, Cost Of Revenue, Gross Profit, Token Holder Net Income, Incentives, and Earnings, with values and optional label breakdowns. When querying a parent protocol (e.g. `aave`), the response includes a `childProtocols` array with per-version methodology. When querying a child protocol (e.g. `aave-v3`), methodology and breakdownMethodology are at the top level. Required: protocol.

tools.name: metrics_get-treasury
tools.description: Returns protocol metadata along with current treasury figures and chain breakdowns. Required: protocol.

tools.name: metrics_get-tvl
tools.description: Returns protocol metadata along with current TVL figures, chain breakdowns, and other aggregate metrics. Required: protocol.

tools.name: metrics_list
tools.description: Returns an object mapping fork names to arrays of protocol names that are forks of each protocol.

tools.name: metrics_list-oracle
tools.description: Returns an object mapping oracle names to arrays of protocol names that use each oracle.

tools.name: metrics_category_get
tools.description: Returns aggregate metrics for the specified dimension filtered by a specific category. Required: metric (default: fees), category. Optional: dataType.

tools.name: metrics_category_get-metrics
tools.description: Returns aggregate metrics for the specified dimension filtered by both category and chain. Required: metric (default: fees), category, chain. Optional: dataType.

tools.name: metrics_chain_get
tools.description: Returns aggregate metrics for the specified dimension filtered by a specific chain. Required: metric (default: fees), chain. Optional: dataType.

tools.name: metrics_protocol_get
tools.description: Returns protocol metadata along with aggregate metrics for the specified dimension. Required: metric (default: fees), protocol. Optional: dataType.

tools.name: oracles_list
tools.description: Overview of all oracles accross all protocols. Returns the OraclesListResponse.

tools.name: overview_get
tools.description: List all dexs along with summaries of their volumes and dataType history data filtering by chain. Required: chain, excludeTotalDataChart, excludeTotalDataChartBreakdown. Returns the OverviewGetResponse.

params.name: chain
params.description: chain name, list of all supported chains can be found under allChains attribute in /overview/dexs response

params.name: excludeTotalDataChart
params.description: true to exclude aggregated chart from response

params.name: excludeTotalDataChartBreakdown
params.description: true to exclude broken down chart from response

tools.name: overview_get-fees
tools.description: List all protocols along with summaries of their fees and revenue and dataType history data by chain. Required: chain, excludeTotalDataChart, excludeTotalDataChartBreakdown. Optional: dataType. Returns the OverviewGetFeesResponse.

params.name: chain
params.description: chain name, list of all supported chains can be found under allChains attribute in /overview/fees response

params.name: excludeTotalDataChart
params.description: true to exclude aggregated chart from response

params.name: excludeTotalDataChartBreakdown
params.description: true to exclude broken down chart from response

params.name: dataType
params.description: Desired data type, dailyFees by default.

tools.name: overview_get-options
tools.description: List all options dexs along with summaries of their volumes and dataType history data filtering by chain. Required: chain, excludeTotalDataChart, excludeTotalDataChartBreakdown. Optional: dataType.

params.name: chain
params.description: chain name, list of all supported chains can be found under allChains attribute in /overview/options response

params.name: excludeTotalDataChart
params.description: true to exclude aggregated chart from response

params.name: excludeTotalDataChartBreakdown
params.description: true to exclude broken down chart from response

params.name: dataType
params.description: Desired data type, dailyNotionalVolume by default.

tools.name: overview_list
tools.description: List all dexs along with summaries of their volumes and dataType history data. Required: excludeTotalDataChart, excludeTotalDataChartBreakdown. Returns the OverviewListResponse.

params.name: excludeTotalDataChart
params.description: true to exclude aggregated chart from response

params.name: excludeTotalDataChartBreakdown
params.description: true to exclude broken down chart from response

tools.name: overview_list-derivatives
tools.description: Lists all derivatives along summaries of their volumes filtering by chain. Required: excludeTotalDataChart, excludeTotalDataChartBreakdown. Returns the OverviewListDerivativesResponse.

params.name: excludeTotalDataChart
params.description: true to exclude aggregated chart from response

params.name: excludeTotalDataChartBreakdown
params.description: true to exclude broken down chart from response

tools.name: overview_list-fees
tools.description: List all protocols along with summaries of their fees and revenue and dataType history data. Required: excludeTotalDataChart, excludeTotalDataChartBreakdown. Optional: dataType. Returns the OverviewListFeesResponse.

params.name: excludeTotalDataChart
params.description: true to exclude aggregated chart from response

params.name: excludeTotalDataChartBreakdown
params.description: true to exclude broken down chart from response

params.name: dataType
params.description: Desired data type, dailyFees by default.

tools.name: overview_list-openinterest
tools.description: List all open interest dex exchanges along with summaries of their open interest. Required: excludeTotalDataChart, excludeTotalDataChartBreakdown. Returns the OverviewListOpeninterestResponse.

params.name: excludeTotalDataChart
params.description: true to exclude aggregated chart from response

params.name: excludeTotalDataChartBreakdown
params.description: true to exclude broken down chart from response

tools.name: overview_list-options
tools.description: List all options dexs along with summaries of their volumes and dataType history data. Required: excludeTotalDataChart, excludeTotalDataChartBreakdown. Optional: dataType. Returns the OverviewListOptionsResponse.

params.name: excludeTotalDataChart
params.description: true to exclude aggregated chart from response

params.name: excludeTotalDataChartBreakdown
params.description: true to exclude broken down chart from response

params.name: dataType
params.description: Desired data type, dailyNotionalVolume by default.

tools.name: percentage_get
tools.description: Strings accepted by period: Can use regular chart candle notion like ‘4h’ etc where: W = week, D = day, H = hour, M = minute (not case sensitive). Required: coins. Optional: timestamp, lookForward, period. Returns the PercentageGetResponse.

params.name: coins
params.description: set of comma-separated tokens defined as {chain}:{address}

params.name: timestamp
params.description: timestamp of data point requested, defaults to time now

params.name: lookForward
params.description: whether you want the duration after your given timestamp or not, defaults to false (looking back)

params.name: period
params.description: duration between data points, defaults to 24 hours

tools.name: pools_list
tools.description: Retrieve the latest data for all pools, including enriched information such as predictions. Returns array of PoolsListItem.

tools.name: prices_get
tools.description: The goal of this API is to price as many tokens as possible, including exotic ones that never get traded, which makes them impossible to price by looking at markets. The base of our data are prices pulled from coingecko, which is then extended through multiple means: - We price all bridged tokens by using the price of the token in it's original chain, so we fetch all bridged versions of USDC on arbitrum, fantom, avax... and price all them using the price for the token on Ethereum, which we know. Right now we support 10 different bridging protocols. - We have multiple adapters to price specialized sets of tokens by running custom code: - We price yearn's yToken LPs by checking how much underlying token can be withdrawn for each LP - Aave, compound and euler LP tokens are also priced based on their relationship against underlying tokens - Uniswap, curve, balancer and stargate LPs are priced using the underlying tokens in each pair - GMX's GLP token is priced based on the value of tokens given on withdrawal (which includes calculations based on trader's PnL) - Synthetix tokens are priced using forex prices of the coin they are pegged to - For tokens that we haven't been able to price in any other way, we find the pool with most liquidity for each on uniswap, curve and serum and then use the prices provided on those exchanges. Unlike all the other tokens, we can't confirm that these prices are correct, so we only ingest the ones that have sufficient liquidity and, even in that case, we attach a `confidence` value to them that is related to the depth of liquidity and which represents our confidence in the quality of each price. API consumers can choose to filter out prices with low confidence values. Our API server is fully open source and we are constantly adding more pricing adapters, extending the amount of tokens we support. Tokens are queried using {chain}:{address}, where chain is an identifier such as ethereum, bsc, polygon, avax... You can also get tokens by coingecko id by setting `coingecko` as the chain, eg: coingecko:ethereum, coingecko:bitcoin. Examples: - ethereum:0xdF574c24545E5FfEcb9a659c229253D4111d87e1 - bsc:0x762539b45a1dcce3d36d080f74d1aed37844b878 - coingecko:ethereum - arbitrum:0x4277f8f2c384827b5273592ff7cebd9f2c1ac258. Required: coins. Optional: searchWidth. Returns the PricesGetResponse.

params.name: coins
params.description: set of comma-separated tokens defined as {chain}:{address}

params.name: searchWidth
params.description: time range on either side to find price data, defaults to 6 hours

tools.name: prices_get-first
tools.description: Get earliest timestamp price record for coins. Required: coins. Returns the PricesGetFirstResponse.

params.name: coins
params.description: set of comma-separated tokens defined as {chain}:{address}

tools.name: prices_get-historical
tools.description: See /prices/current for explanation on how prices are sourced. Required: coins, timestamp. Optional: searchWidth. Returns the PricesGetHistoricalResponse.

params.name: coins
params.description: set of comma-separated tokens defined as {chain}:{address}

params.name: timestamp
params.description: UNIX timestamp of time when you want historical prices

params.name: searchWidth
params.description: time range on either side to find price data, defaults to 6 hours

tools.name: protocol_get
tools.description: Get historical TVL of a protocol and breakdowns by token and chain. Required: protocol. Returns the ProtocolGetResponse.

tools.name: protocols_list
tools.description: List all protocols on defillama along with their tvl. Returns array of ProtocolsListItem.

tools.name: raises_list
tools.description: Overview of all raises on our Raises dashboard. Returns the RaisesListResponse.

tools.name: rwa_get
tools.description: Returns current RWA assets that have onchain market cap, active market cap, or DeFi active TVL on the requested chain. Required: chain.

tools.name: rwa_get-chart
tools.description: Returns historical onchain market cap, active market cap, and DeFi active TVL totals for a chain. Required: chain.

params.name: chain
params.description: Chain display name. The API normalizes it to the internal RWA slug.

tools.name: rwa_list
tools.description: Returns current Real World Asset rows with per-chain onchain market cap, active market cap, and DeFi active TVL maps.

tools.name: rwa_list-chart
tools.description: Returns time series rows with one column per chain for the selected RWA metric. Optional: key, includeStablecoin, includeGovernance.

params.name: key
params.description: Metric to break down by chain. Defaults to onChainMcap.

params.name: includeStablecoin
params.description: Include stablecoin-token assets in the chart totals.

params.name: includeGovernance
params.description: Include governance-token assets in the chart totals.

tools.name: rwa_list-list
tools.description: Returns lightweight RWA lists used for discovery, search, and filters.

tools.name: rwa_list-stats
tools.description: Returns RWA aggregates. For the default per-chain table, read byChain[chain].base: assetIssuers.length, assetCount, activeMcap, onChainMcap, and defiActiveTvl. Add stablecoinsOnly, governanceOnly, and stablecoinsAndGovernance when those buckets should be included.

tools.name: stablecoin_get
tools.description: Get historical mcap and historical chain distribution of a stablecoin. Required: asset. Returns the StablecoinGetResponse.

params.name: asset
params.description: stablecoin ID, you can get these from /stablecoins

tools.name: stablecoinchains_list
tools.description: Get current mcap sum of all stablecoins on each chain. Returns array of StablecoinchainsListItem.

tools.name: stablecoincharts_get
tools.description: Get historical mcap sum of all stablecoins in a chain. Required: chain. Optional: stablecoin. Returns array of StablecoinchartsGetItem.

params.name: chain
params.description: chain slug, you can get these from /chains or the chains property on /protocols

params.name: stablecoin
params.description: stablecoin ID, you can get these from /stablecoins

tools.name: stablecoincharts_list
tools.description: Get historical mcap sum of all stablecoins. Optional: stablecoin. Returns array of StablecoinchartsListItem.

params.name: stablecoin
params.description: stablecoin ID, you can get these from /stablecoins

tools.name: stablecoinprices_list
tools.description: Get historical prices of all stablecoins. Returns array of StablecoinpricesListItem.

tools.name: stablecoins_get
tools.description: Get stablecoin dominance per chain along with the info about the larges coin in a chain. Required: chain. Optional: stablecoin. Returns array of StablecoinsGetItem.

params.name: chain
params.description: chain slug, you can get these from /chains or the chains property on /protocols

params.name: stablecoin
params.description: stablecoin ID, you can get these from /stablecoins

tools.name: stablecoins_list
tools.description: List all stablecoins along with their circulating amounts. Optional: includePrices. Returns the StablecoinsListResponse.

params.name: includePrices
params.description: set whether to include current stablecoin prices

tools.name: summary_get
tools.description: Get summary of dex volume with historical data. Required: protocol, excludeTotalDataChart, excludeTotalDataChartBreakdown. Returns the SummaryGetResponse.

params.name: excludeTotalDataChart
params.description: true to exclude aggregated chart from response

params.name: excludeTotalDataChartBreakdown
params.description: true to exclude broken down chart from response

tools.name: summary_get-derivatives
tools.description: Volume Details about a specific perp protocol. Required: protocol, excludeTotalDataChart, excludeTotalDataChartBreakdown. Returns the SummaryGetDerivativesResponse.

params.name: excludeTotalDataChart
params.description: true to exclude aggregated chart from response

params.name: excludeTotalDataChartBreakdown
params.description: true to exclude broken down chart from response

tools.name: summary_get-fees
tools.description: Get summary of protocol fees and revenue with historical data. Required: protocol. Optional: dataType. Returns the SummaryGetFeesResponse.

params.name: dataType
params.description: Desired data type, dailyFees by default.

tools.name: summary_get-options
tools.description: Get summary of options dex volume with historical data. Required: protocol. Optional: dataType.

params.name: dataType
params.description: Desired data type, dailyNotionalVolume by default.

tools.name: token-protocols_get
tools.description: Lists the amount of a certain token within all protocols. Data for the Token Usage page. Required: symbol. Returns array of TokenProtocolsGetItem.

tools.name: treasuries_list
tools.description: List all protocols on our Treasuries dashboard. Returns array of TreasuriesListItem.

tools.name: tvl_get
tools.description: Simplified endpoint that only returns a number, the current TVL of a protocol. Required: protocol.

tools.name: usage_list
tools.description: Get amount of credits left in the api key, these reset on the 1st of each month.

tools.name: yields_get
tools.description: Historical borrow cost APY from a pool on a lending market, pool ids should be obtained from /poolsBorrow. Required: pool. Returns array of YieldsGetItem.

params.name: pool
params.description: pool id, can be retrieved from /poolsBorrow (property is called pool)

tools.name: yields_list
tools.description: APY rates of multiple LSDs. Returns array of YieldsListItem.

tools.name: yields_list-perps
tools.description: Funding rates and Open Interest of perps across exchanges, including both Decentralized and Centralized. Returns array of YieldsListPerpsItem.

tools.name: yields_list-poolsborrow
tools.description: Borrow costs APY of assets from lending markets. Returns array of YieldsListPoolsborrowItem.

tools.name: yields_list-poolsold
tools.description: Same as /pools but it also includes a new parameter `pool_old` which usually contains pool address (but not guaranteed). Returns array of YieldsListPoolsoldItem.
